name: handoff
description: Cross-harness advice plus explicit plain and with-advice handoff families for Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, OpenCode, and Cursor through one fail-closed MJS authority.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate independently or let the worker ask for advice
interface.longDescription: Ask any supported harness for read-only advice, delegate without any nested Handoff authority, or explicitly delegate with an advice-only capability. Every node uses the same current fail-closed MJS authority with pinned model and effort receipts, attenuated Bash/web/MCP grants, bounded lineage, deterministic Git evidence, and structured results.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Fable for architecture advice at max effort
Have Codex review the diff without nested advice
Let Grok build the parser and ask Claude for advice if needed
